examples: Several years of experience as a qualified carpenter or cabinetmaker are required.
Excuse me. I couldn't help overhearing your conversation. I happen to be a cabinetmaker and I can start work right away.
That's why I live in a cabin in the woods. It's miles away from the nearest bypass. It's the perfect place for a retired cabinetmaker.
"I'm glad Doug Von Allmen is rich, " says Mitch Davies, the Australian cabinetmaker.
The 71-year-old chairman of the American Wing developed his eye for craftsmanship as a teenage "amateur cabinetmaker" growing up in Philadelphia.
